title: Validate an Assumption
description: Test a belief you are relying on while debugging.
content:
While debugging, I am assuming: {{assumption}}

This might be wrong. Tell me the cheapest way to actually verify it (a log, an assert, a one-line check, a debugger watch). Do not let me keep building on an unverified assumption. If it is false, what does that immediately imply about where the bug really is?

variables.name: assumption
variables.description: The belief you are relying on
